title: What's new in v2.52.0
content:
Features:
- One-sided UI mode
- Thumbnail preview support for custom brushes, custom objects, tilesets, and timelapse files

Enhancements:
- Customizable tileset canvas grid color
- Timelapse export now uses a speed multiplier instead of a max length
- Timelapse videos now have customizable last-frame showcase durations
- Timelapse data will also copied when an artwork is copied
- Timelapse videos can be exported independently from their original artwork
- Always show layer multi-select checkbox

Fixes:
- Move tool sometimes doesn't work after using the magic wand
- A rare crash when exporting the sprite sheet
